memberdef.argsstring: (Size size) noexcept
memberdef.name: Buffer

briefdescription.para: Construct a buffer with the given size and fill it with an initial block.

memberdef.argsstring: () const noexcept
memberdef.name: size

briefdescription.para: Get the configured size of the buffer.

simplesect.para: The width and height of the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: () const noexcept
memberdef.name: rect

briefdescription.para: Get a rectangle representing this buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos) const noexcept
memberdef.name: get

briefdescription.para: Read the block stored at the given position.

simplesect.para: A reference to the stored block.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block) noexcept
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: Write a block at the given position.

simplesect.para: Writes outside the buffer are ignored.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, Char &&block) noexcept
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: set

briefdescription.para: Write a block at the given position using a combination style.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

simplesect.para: Writes outside the buffer are ignored.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Char &fillBlock) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill/clear the buffer with the given character.

parameterdescription.para: The block to use to fill the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the given rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
Positions outside the buffer are ignored.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
fillBlock
The block for filling.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, Color baseColor={}, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the given rectangle using a repeating 9-tile style.

detaileddescription.para:
Positions outside the buffer are ignored.
rect
The rectangle to be filled.
style
The tile style to repeat across the rectangle.
baseColor
The base color underneath the style colors.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &frameBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, Color frameColor={}, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle using a repeating 9-tile style.

detaileddescription.para:
This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
style
The tile style for the frame.
frameColor
The base frame color. Any color from the style overlays this base color.
combinationStyle
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, FrameStyle frameStyle, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle.

parameterdescription.para: The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const FrameDrawOptions &options=FrameDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a frame inside a given rectangle with configurable style, fill, and animated colors.

detaileddescription.para:
This will set all blocks at the edge, inside the given rectangle. If options.fillBlock() is empty and no Tile9Style is active, the interior is left unchanged.
rect
The rectangle for the frame.
options
Frame drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for frame and fill color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char &frameBlock, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, const Tile9StylePtr &style, const Char &fillBlock, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle={}, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it using a repeating 9-tile style for the frame.

parameterdescription.para: The tile style for the frame.
The combination style for overwriting existing characters.
The base frame color. Any color from the style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, FrameStyle frameStyle, const Char &fillBlock, Color frameColor={}) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFilledFrame

briefdescription.para: Draw a box and fill it.

parameterdescription.para: The base frame color. Any color from the frame style overlays this base color.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: Draw simple text into a rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.
text
The text description.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view text, Alignment alignment, Rectangle rect, Color color={}, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: Draw simple text into a rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.
text
The UTF-8 text to render.
alignment
The alignment inside the rectangle.
rect
The target rectangle.
color
The text color.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view text, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, Color color={}, std::size_t animationCycle=0)
memberdef.name: drawText

briefdescription.para: Draw simple text into a rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
If fg or bg is set to Inherited, the current color from the buffer is used.
text
The UTF-8 text to render.
rect
The target rectangle.
alignment
The alignment inside the rectangle.
color
The text color.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for animated text.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Position pos, const BitmapDrawOptions &options=BitmapDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmap

briefdescription.para: Draw a bitmap at a given position.

detaileddescription.para:
The bitmap is rendered according to options.scaleMode(). If options.char16Style() is set, it overrides the scale mode and renders one terminal cell per bitmap pixel. Pixels or rendered cells outside the buffer are ignored.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
pos
The position of the top left corner.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, Rectangle rect, Alignment alignment=Alignment::TopLeft, const BitmapDrawOptions &options=BitmapDrawOptions::defaultOptions(), std::size_t animationCycle=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmap

briefdescription.para: Draw a bitmap into the given rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
The rendered bitmap is aligned inside rect. If it is larger than rect, it is cropped according to the alignment.
For half-block drawing mode, alignment and cropping happen at rendered cell boundaries, not per pixel.
bitmap
The bitmap to draw.
rect
The rectangle to draw the bitmap into.
alignment
Alignment of the bitmap within the rectangle.
options
Bitmap drawing options.
animationCycle
Animation cycle for color animations.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Char &block, Color baseColor)
memberdef.name: applyBaseColor

memberdef.argsstring: (Rectangle rect, Position pos, const Char16StylePtr &frameStyle)
memberdef.name: blockForFrame

memberdef.argsstring: (const Bitmap &bitmap, const BitmapDrawOptions &options) noexcept
memberdef.name: bitmapRenderSize

memberdef.argsstring: (int renderedSize, int availableSize, Alignment alignment, Alignment alignmentMask) noexcept -> int
memberdef.name: alignedBitmapOffset

memberdef.argsstring: (const ColorSequence &colorSequence, FrameColorMode colorMode, Rectangle rect, Position pos, std::size_t animationCycle, std::size_t animationOffset) noexcept -> Color
memberdef.name: colorForFramePosition

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text) const
memberdef.name: buildTextLines

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text) const
memberdef.name: buildFontTextLines

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text, const BlockStringLines &lines, std::size_t animationCycle) noexcept
memberdef.name: applyTextLines

memberdef.argsstring: (const BitmapDrawOptions &options, Position bitmapPosition, std::size_t animationCycle) const noexcept -> Color
memberdef.name: colorForBitmapPosition

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block, Color baseColor, const BitmapDrawOptions &options) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawBitmapBlock

memberdef.argsstring: (Position pos, const Char &block, Color baseColor, const CharCombinationStylePtr &combinationStyle) noexcept
memberdef.name: drawFrameBlock

memberdef.argsstring: (const Text &text, const Char &character, Position position, std::size_t animationCycle) const noexcept -> Color
memberdef.name: colorForTextPosition

briefdescription.para: A mutable 2D buffer storing characters and colors for rendering.

detaileddescription.para:
Handling of non-1-width blocks:
Blocks with zero display width are ignored.
Blocks with a display width of 2 will overwrite two adjacent cells.
The first cell will contain the set character, the next cell a zero-width (empty) character.
Both cells will have the same color.
A 2-width block at the right edge is ignored.
Blocks with a display width > 2 are ignored.
